title: dolichos complanatus
intro: Dolichos complanatus, also known as flat-seeded dolichos or horse gram, is an annual legume native to Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dolichos complanatus include lowering cholesterol levels, managing diabetes, and providing antioxidant protection. Dolichos complanatus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tea, capsules, and powder, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
